name: Sensitive Data Exposure
description: Sensitive data is present but no trust boundaries are defined to isolate or protect it.
cause: Sensitive data items exist in the model but no trust boundaries are declared to restrict access.
recommendation: Define explicit trust boundaries between internal and external zones.
Encrypt sensitive data both in transit and at rest.

name: Direct Database Access Without Intermediate Layer
description: Data flows indicate direct access to databases without a service or API layer acting as an intermediary.
cause: One or more data flows connect directly to a database without passing through an API or service.
recommendation: Introduce a dedicated service or repository layer between callers and the database.

name: Missing API Layer
description: Data flows exist but no APIs are defined, meaning components interact without defined contracts.
cause: Data flows are defined but the API layer is missing from the architecture.
recommendation: Define explicit API contracts for all inter-component communication.

name: User Roles Without Access Control Boundaries
description: User roles are defined but no trust boundaries or access control layers exist to enforce authorisation.
cause: User roles are declared in the model but no trust boundaries are referenced.
recommendation: Implement Role-Based Access Control (RBAC) and assign permissions explicitly per role.
Define trust boundaries that segment what each role can reach.

name: Unused Database
description: Databases exist but no data flows reference them, indicating an unused or isolated storage system.
cause: The architecture defines databases that are not part of any data flow.
recommendation: Ensure all required databases are connected to services.
Remove unused database components to reduce attack surface.

name: External Dependencies Without Trust Boundaries
description: External dependencies are present but no trust boundaries are defined, leaving third-party interactions ungoverned.
cause: External dependencies are listed but no trust boundary separates them from internal components.
recommendation: Define explicit trust boundaries between internal systems and third-party services.

name: Sensitive Data Transmitted Without Encryption Reference
description: Sensitive data appears in data flows but there is no mention of encryption or secure transport.
cause: Sensitive data items are present in data flows but no encryption reference is found in the model.
recommendation: Enforce TLS on all communication channels carrying sensitive data.

name: APIs Present Without Authentication Reference
description: APIs are defined but no authentication mechanism is referenced in the model.
cause: APIs are declared in the model but no authentication method is referenced in components, APIs, or trust boundaries.

name: Insecure Communication
description: Data flows are present but no trust boundaries exist, meaning data movement across zones is unprotected.
cause: Data flows traverse components but no trust boundaries are defined to separate security zones.
recommendation: Define trust boundaries aligned with security zones.
Enforce TLS on all cross-boundary data flows.

name: SQL Injection Risk
description: APIs interact with databases with no validation or ORM layer implied, creating SQL injection exposure.
cause: APIs and databases both exist in the model but no input validation or ORM is referenced between them.
recommendation: Use parameterised queries or a trusted ORM for all database interactions.

name: External Dependencies With No Validation Layer
description: External dependencies exist but no validation or API gateway layer is present to mediate access.
cause: External dependencies are listed but the model contains no API gateway or proxy.
recommendation: Route all external calls through an API gateway or reverse proxy.

name: Insecure Direct Object Reference Risk
description: User roles interact with databases directly in data flows without an access control layer.
cause: Data flows reference both user roles and databases directly without any authorisation check.
recommendation: Implement server-side authorisation checks before any database query.

name: Privilege Escalation Risk
description: Multiple user roles exist but no trust boundaries segment or restrict what each role can access.
cause: Multiple user roles are defined but no trust boundaries separate their access zones.
recommendation: Define trust boundaries that explicitly limit each role to its permitted access zone.

name: Unprotected Admin or Privileged Role Detected
description: An admin or privileged role is defined in the model without any associated trust boundary or access restriction.
cause: An admin or privileged role exists in the model but no trust boundaries protect it.
recommendation: Restrict admin access to a dedicated, IP-allowlisted management plane.
